name: Super Mario 64
description: The first Super Mario game to feature 3D gameplay, it features freedom of movement within a large open world based on polygons, combined with traditional Mario gameplay, visual style, and characters.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Area Rando
options.description: Randomize Entrances

options.label: Buddy Checks
options.description: Bob-omb Buddies are checks, Cannon Unlocks are items

options.label: Exclamation Boxes
options.description: Include 1Up Exclamation Boxes during randomization.

options.label: Progressive Keys
options.description: Keys will first grant you access to the Basement, then to the Second Floor

options.label: Enable Coin Stars
options.description: Determine logic for 100 Coin Stars.

options.label: Enable Locked Paintings
options.description: Determine how paintings are treated.

options.label: Enable Move Rando
options.description: Mario is unable to perform some actions until a corresponding item is picked up.

options.label: Move Rando Actions
options.description: Which actions to randomize when Move Randomizer is enabled

options.label: Strict Cap Requirements
options.description: If disabled, Stars that expect special caps may have to be acquired without the caps

options.label: Strict Cannon Requirements
options.description: If disabled, Stars that expect cannons may have to be acquired without them.

options.label: Strict Move Requirements
options.description: If disabled, Stars that expect certain moves may have to be acquired without them.

options.label: Amount Of Stars
options.description: How many stars exist.

options.label: First Bowser Star Door Cost
options.description: What percent of the total stars are required at the Star Door to Bowser in the Dark World

options.label: Basement Star Door Cost
options.description: What percent of the total stars are required at the Star Door in the Basement

options.label: Second Floor Star Door Cost
options.description: What percent of the total stars are required to access the third floor

options.label: Mips1 Cost
options.description: What percent of the total stars are required to spawn MIPS the first time

options.label: Mips2 Cost
options.description: What percent of the total stars are required to spawn MIPS the second time.

options.label: Stars To Finish
options.description: What percent of the total stars are required at the infinite stairs

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.

options.label: Completion Type
options.description: Set goal for game completion
